---
name: Regulatory Update
about: Report a new AI law, amendment, enforcement action, or court decision Kevin should know about
title: "[Regulatory] "
labels: regulatory-update
assignees: ''
---

## What changed?

Describe the regulatory development:

## Details

- **Jurisdiction:** (e.g., EU, US Federal, California, UK, Singapore)
- - **Law/Regulation:** (e.g., EU AI Act, CAIA, GDPR, new state law)
  - - **Type of change:**
    -   - [ ] New law or regulation enacted
        - [ ]   - [ ] Amendment to existing law
        - [ ]     - [ ] Enforcement action or fine
        - [ ]   - [ ] Court decision or ruling
        - [ ]     - [ ] Regulatory guidance or opinion
        - [ ]   - [ ] Compliance deadline approaching
        - [ ]     - [ ] Other
     
        - [ ] ## Effective date
     
        - [ ] When does this take effect (or when did it happen)?
     
        - [ ] ## Impact on Kevin
     
        - [ ] Which parts of Kevin need updating?
     
        - [ ] - [ ] SKILL.md (quick reference, timeline, definitions)
        - [ ] - [ ] references/knowledge-base.md (regulatory landscape, contract playbook, etc.)
        - [ ] - [ ] references/workflows.md (workflow process or criteria changes)
        - [ ] - [ ] README.md (deadline table, coverage list)
        - [ ] - [ ] Not sure
     
        - [ ] ## Source
     
        - [ ] Link to the official legal text, press release, or reliable reporting:
     
        - [ ] ## Suggested changes
     
        - [ ] If you know what Kevin should say or do differently, describe it here:
     
        - [ ] ## Would you like to contribute this?
     
        - [ ] - [ ] Yes, I'll submit a PR with the update
        - [ ] - [ ] I can provide the legal analysis but need help with formatting
        - [ ] - [ ] No, just flagging it
